response.justification: James Smith brings solid software engineering fundamentals with 17 years of experience and a current staff-level role at an AI-focused company. However, his background is primarily hands-on full-stack development across diverse technologies rather than strategic AI leadership. While his recent work at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure, the resume shows no demonstrated expertise in AI products, platforms, or thought leadership—nor the preferred advanced degree in an AI-related field. He lacks clear evidence of the strategic advisory and organizational influence expected of a director-level AI strategy principal.
strengths: Exceeds minimum 15-year experience requirement with demonstrated progression to staff-level engineering roles
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, gaining hands-on AI systems experience
Strong communicator and knowledge-sharer with proven ability to mentor others through workshops, talks, and teaching initiatives
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field; educational background is primarily in general computer science and fine arts
AI expertise appears recent (April 2025 start) and implementation-focused rather than strategic; no demonstrated AI products or platforms built
Career trajectory shows hands-on development and technical craftsmanship but lacks evidence of strategic decision-making, customer advisory work, or recognized thought leadership in AI

key_factors.factor: AI strategic expertise and demonstrated products
Years of engineering experience meeting 15+ requirement
